name: Visual Translate by Vozo
tagline: Localize video text overlays into any language without rebuilding your visuals.
problem: Businesses expanding into global markets face the costly, time-consuming task of recreating video assets whenever they need localized versions. Text embedded in graphics, titles, and overlays typically requires a designer to manually rebuild each element. Visual Translate automates this by detecting and replacing on-screen text while preserving the original visual design.
useCases: Localize marketing videos for international campaigns without redesigning motion graphics
Translate product demo videos into multiple languages for regional sales teams
Adapt e-learning course videos with translated text overlays for global learners
Convert social media video content into different languages to reach new audiences
